ggsegKong 1.0.1
  • Reference

Kong 2022 Areal MS-HBM 17-Network Atlases

Source: R/kong2022.R
kong2022_100.Rd

Brain atlases for the Kong et al. (2022) Areal MS-HBM cortical parcellation aligned to 17 resting-state networks. Available in 100 to 1000 parcel configurations. Contains both 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

kong2022_100()

kong2022_200()

kong2022_300()

kong2022_400()

kong2022_500()

kong2022_600()

kong2022_700()

kong2022_800()

kong2022_900()

kong2022_1000()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Kong R, et al. (2022). "Individual-Specific Areal-Level Parcellations Improve Functional Connectivity Prediction of Behavior." Cerebral Cortex, 31(10):4477-4500. doi:10.1093/cercor/bhab101

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: kong2019()

Other cortical_atlases: kong2019()

Examples

kong2022_100()
#> 
#> ── kong2022_100 ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 64
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 100 × 4
#>     hemi  region              label                                network    
#>     <chr> <chr>               <chr>                                <chr>      
#>   1 left  DefaultC_PHC        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC        DefaultC   
#>   2 left  DefaultC_pCun       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_pCun       DefaultC   
#>   3 left  DefaultB_IPL        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL        DefaultB   
#>   4 left  DefaultB_PFCd_1     lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_1     DefaultB   
#>   5 left  DefaultB_PFCd_2     lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_2     DefaultB   
#>   6 left  DefaultB_PFCv_1     lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_1     DefaultB   
#>   7 left  DefaultB_PFCv_2     lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_2     DefaultB   
#>   8 left  DefaultB_Temp       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp       DefaultB   
#>   9 left  DefaultB_TempPole   lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_TempPole   DefaultB   
#>  10 left  DefaultA_IPL        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_IPL        DefaultA   
#>  11 left  DefaultA_PCC        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC        DefaultA   
#>  12 left  DefaultA_PFCd       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd       DefaultA   
#>  13 left  DefaultA_PFCm       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm       DefaultA   
#>  14 left  DefaultA_RSC        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_RSC        DefaultA   
#>  15 left  ContC_PCC           lh_17networks_LH_ContC_PCC           ContC      
#>  16 left  ContB_FPole         lh_17networks_LH_ContB_FPole         ContB      
#>  17 left  ContB_OFC           lh_17networks_LH_ContB_OFC           ContB      
#>  18 left  ContB_Temp          lh_17networks_LH_ContB_Temp          ContB      
#>  19 left  ContA_IPS_1         lh_17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_1         ContA      
#>  20 left  ContA_IPS_2         lh_17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_2         ContA      
#>  21 left  ContA_PrCv          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PrCv          ContA      
#>  22 left  ContA_Temp          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_Temp          ContA      
#>  23 left  Language_Temp       lh_17networks_LH_Language_Temp       Language   
#>  24 left  SalVenAttnB_FrMed   lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_FrMed   SalVenAttnB
#>  25 left  SalVenAttnB_Ins_1   lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_Ins_1   SalVenAttnB
#>  26 left  SalVenAttnB_Ins_2   lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_Ins_2   SalVenAttnB
#>  27 left  SalVenAttnB_PFCl    lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_PFCl    SalVenAttnB
#>  28 left  SalVenAttnB_SPL     lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_SPL     SalVenAttnB
#>  29 left  SalVenAttnA_ParOper lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnA_ParOper SalVenAttnA
#>  30 left  SalVenAttnA_PrC     lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnA_PrC     SalVenAttnA
#>  31 left  DorsAttnB_PrCd      lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PrCd      DorsAttnB  
#>  32 left  DorsAttnB_SPL       lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_SPL       DorsAttnB  
#>  33 left  DorsAttnA_PostC     lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnA_PostC     DorsAttnA  
#>  34 left  DorsAttnA_SPL       lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnA_SPL       DorsAttnA  
#>  35 left  Aud_Ins             lh_17networks_LH_Aud_Ins             Aud        
#>  36 left  SomMotB_1           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotB_1           SomMotB    
#>  37 left  SomMotB_2           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotB_2           SomMotB    
#>  38 left  SomMotA_1           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_1           SomMotA    
#>  39 left  SomMotA_2           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_2           SomMotA    
#>  40 left  SomMotA_3           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_3           SomMotA    
#>  41 left  SomMotA_4           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_4           SomMotA    
#>  42 left  SomMotA_5           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_5           SomMotA    
#>  43 left  VisualC             lh_17networks_LH_VisualC             VisualC

#>  45 left  VisualB_2           lh_17networks_LH_VisualB_2           VisualB    
#>  46 left  VisualB_3           lh_17networks_LH_VisualB_3           VisualB

#>  49 left  VisualA_2           lh_17networks_LH_VisualA_2           VisualA    
#>  50 left  VisualA_TempOcc     lh_17networks_LH_VisualA_TempOcc     VisualA    
#>  51 right DefaultC_PHC        rh_17networks_RH_DefaultC_PHC        DefaultC   
#>  52 right ContC_pCun          rh_17networks_RH_ContC_pCun          ContC      
#>  53 right DefaultB_IPL        rh_17networks_RH_DefaultB_IPL        DefaultB   
#>  54 right DefaultB_PFCd_1     rh_17networks_RH_DefaultB_PFCd_1     DefaultB   
#>  55 right SalVenAttnA_PFCd    rh_17networks_RH_SalVenAttnA_PFCd    SalVenAttnA
#>  56 right DefaultB_PFCv_1     rh_17networks_RH_DefaultB_PFCv_1     DefaultB   
#>  57 right SalVenAttnB_PFCv    rh_17networks_RH_SalVenAttnB_PFCv    SalVenAttnB
#>  58 right DefaultA_Temp       rh_17networks_RH_DefaultA_Temp       DefaultA

#>  60 right ContB_IPL           rh_17networks_RH_ContB_IPL           ContB      
#>  61 right DefaultA_PCC        rh_17networks_RH_DefaultA_PCC        DefaultA   
#>  62 right ContB_PFCd          rh_17networks_RH_ContB_PFCd          ContB      
#>  63 right DefaultA_PFCm       rh_17networks_RH_DefaultA_PFCm       DefaultA   
#>  64 right DefaultC_RSC        rh_17networks_RH_DefaultC_RSC        DefaultC   
#>  65 right ContC_PCC           rh_17networks_RH_ContC_PCC           ContC      
#>  66 right ContB_FPole         rh_17networks_RH_ContB_FPole         ContB

#>  70 right DorsAttnA_IPS       rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnA_IPS       DorsAttnA

#>  72 right DefaultC_Temp       rh_17networks_RH_DefaultC_Temp       DefaultC   
#>  73 right Language_Temp       rh_17networks_RH_Language_Temp       Language   
#>  74 right SalVenAttnB_FrMed   rh_17networks_RH_SalVenAttnB_FrMed   SalVenAttnB
#>  75 right SalVenAttnB_Ins_1   rh_17networks_RH_SalVenAttnB_Ins_1   SalVenAttnB
#>  76 right SalVenAttnA_Ins     rh_17networks_RH_SalVenAttnA_Ins     SalVenAttnA
#>  77 right ContC_PFCl          rh_17networks_RH_ContC_PFCl          ContC      
#>  78 right SalVenAttnA_SPL     rh_17networks_RH_SalVenAttnA_SPL     SalVenAttnA
#>  79 right SalVenAttnA_ParOper rh_17networks_RH_SalVenAttnA_ParOper SalVenAttnA
#>  80 right SalVenAttnA_PrC     rh_17networks_RH_SalVenAttnA_PrC     SalVenAttnA
#>  81 right DorsAttnB_PrCd      rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_PrCd      DorsAttnB  
#>  82 right DorsAttnB_SPL       rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_SPL       DorsAttnB  
#>  83 right DorsAttnB_PostC     rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnB_PostC     DorsAttnB  
#>  84 right DorsAttnA_SPL       rh_17networks_RH_DorsAttnA_SPL       DorsAttnA  
#>  85 right Aud_Ins             rh_17networks_RH_Aud_Ins             Aud        
#>  86 right SomMotB_1           rh_17networks_RH_SomMotB_1           SomMotB    
#>  87 right SomMotB_2           rh_17networks_RH_SomMotB_2           SomMotB

if (FALSE) plot(kong2022_100()) # \dontrun{}
kong2022_200()
#> 
#> ── kong2022_200 ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 115
#> Hemispheres: left, right

#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)

kong2022_900()
#> 
#> ── kong2022_900 ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 501
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 900 × 4
#>     hemi  region                label                                  network  
#>     <chr> <chr>                 <chr>                                  <chr>

#>   2 left  DefaultC_IPL          lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL          DefaultC
